code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let target = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let body = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(body)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut in_token = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(body, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if in_token
        let tok = string.substring(body, start, i)
        if tok == target
          count = count + 1
        end
        in_token = false
      end
    else
      if not in_token
        start = i
        in_token = true
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_token
    let tok = string.substring(body, start, n)
    if tok == target
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  println("count=#{count}")
end
